topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)
challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) rule applied correctly in every sentence
